title: Object Sculptor Multi-Subject Corpus

mechanismLimits.articulated-desk-lamp: highest authored radial, spring, hinge-hardware, and fastener detail
mechanismLimits.potted-bonsai: highest oriented-ring sampling with merged opaque leaf solids
mechanismLimits.ceramic-teapot: highest lathe and parallel-transport sweep sampling

tiers.targetClass: ordinary desktop, tablet, and conservative default

mechanismLimits.articulated-desk-lamp: reduced radial, spring, and fastener tessellation
mechanismLimits.potted-bonsai: reduced oriented-ring sampling and fewer merged opaque leaf solids

degradationFromPrevious: reduce visual tessellation and non-protected repeated detail

mechanismLimits.articulated-desk-lamp: minimum silhouette-safe radial/spring detail and no optional shade fasteners
mechanismLimits.potted-bonsai: minimum oriented-ring sampling and six opaque canopy clusters with no alpha-sorted fragments
mechanismLimits.ceramic-teapot: minimum silhouette-safe lathe and sweep sampling

degradationFromPrevious: replace bonsai leaf solids with opaque canopy clusters

capabilityRequirements.evidence: Controller must await WebGPURenderer.init() and reject a backend where isWebGPUBackend is not true; no fallback is activated.
Frame execution must report exactly one scene render and no duplicate diagnostic or presentation render.
Runtime graph and frame record must report zero post-processing passes.
Named-device sustained evidence must report CPU/GPU/presentation timing, render items, submissions, shadow casters, materials/pipelines, and peak live bytes.

runtimeProof.evidence: Capture controller metrics with nativeWebGPU true.
Load all 15 scenario/mechanism/tier/camera physical routes and prove each locks exactly one route dimension.
Load every final, blockout, hierarchy, materials, and action-ready mechanism route and bind the observed controller mode to the physical route record.
Capture protected node, socket, ColliderConstructionInput, destruction-group, mode, tier, and exact-reset inventories for all three targets.
Capture one renderer owner, one scene render, one tone-map owner, one output-transform owner, and zero post-processing passes.
Capture the actual integer WebGPU row stride, 256-byte alignment, compact width, height, and normalized render-target pixels for every required PNG.
Inspect final and diagnostic PNGs for each target and record AI-vision authored-contract scores; no reference-image similarity claim is permitted.
Record named-device sustained CPU/GPU/presentation evidence and mobile resource accounting without inventing a universal frame target.

notes: Deep multi-subject, route, physics, workload, provenance, and visual-acceptance metadata is owned by corpus.contract.json.

Acceptance promotion is falsifiable: validate-manifest.mjs requires every canonical/deep status and target-spec pipeline closure to match validateCorpusArtifacts().claimVerdict (PASS -> accepted, INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE -> incomplete, FAIL -> blocked).
